title: lastrea richardsii
intro: Lastrea richardsii, also known as Richards' lastrea, is a species of fern in the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea richardsii include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of Lastrea richardsii can be made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant in topical creams and ointments.
